en: "Man who is born of a woman is few of days and full of trouble.
zh: “婦人所生的日子短少，滿有攪擾；

en: He comes out like a flower and withers; he flees like a shadow and continues not.
zh: 他生長如花，又遭割下； 他飛去如影，並不停留。

en: And do you open your eyes on such a one and bring me into judgment with you?
zh: 這樣的人你還睜眼看他， 又把他帶到你跟前受審嗎？

en: Who can bring a clean thing out of an unclean? There is not one.
zh: 誰能使潔淨出於污穢呢？ 無人有此本事。

en: Since his days are determined, and the number of his months is with you, and you have appointed his limits that he cannot pass,
zh: 人的日子既然被限定， 他的月數亦在乎你， 你也定下他的界限，使他不能越過。

en: look away from him and leave him alone, that he may enjoy, like a hired hand, his day.
zh: 就求你轉眼不看他，使他得歇息 ， 直等到他像雇工一樣享受他的日子。

en: "For there is hope for a tree, if it be cut down, that it will sprout again, and that its shoots will not cease.
zh: 樹木常有希望， 樹木若被砍下，也會再發芽， 嫩枝仍生長不息。

en: Though its root grow old in the earth, and its stump die in the soil,
zh: 雖然樹根衰老在地裡， 樹幹也枯死在土中，

en: yet at the scent of water it will bud and put out branches like a young plant.
zh: 一有水氣，就會萌芽， 又生長枝條如新栽的樹一樣。

en: But a man dies and is laid low; man breathes his last, and where is he?
zh: 人死了，就化為烏有； 人一氣絕就不在了。

en: As waters fail from a lake and a river wastes away and dries up,
zh: 海洋中的水消失， 江河枯竭乾涸，

en: so a man lies down and rises not again; till the heavens are no more he will not awake or be roused out of his sleep.
zh: 人也是這樣一躺下去，就不再起來， 直到天都沒有了還不醒過來， 也不能從睡眠中被喚醒。

en: Oh that you would hide me in Sheol, that you would conceal me until your wrath be past, that you would appoint me a set time, and remember me!
zh: 但願你把我藏在陰間， 把我隱藏，直到你的怒氣過去； 願你為我定一個期限，好記念我。

en: If a man dies, shall he live again? All the days of my service I would wait, till my renewal should come.
zh: 人若死了，怎能再活呢？ 我要在我一切勞苦的日子等待， 等到我得釋放的時候來到。

en: You would call, and I would answer you; you would long for the work of your hands.
zh: 你一呼叫，我就回答你， 你必渴慕你手所作的。

en: For then you would number my steps; you would not keep watch over my sin;
zh: 但現在你數點我的腳步， 必不再鑒察我的罪過，

en: my transgression would be sealed up in a bag, and you would cover over my iniquity.
zh: 我的過犯被你封在囊中， 我的罪孽你以灰泥遮蓋了。

en: "But the mountain falls and crumbles away, and the rock is removed from its place;
zh: 山崩下墜， 巖石挪開原處；

en: the waters wear away the stones; the torrents wash away the soil of the earth; so you destroy the hope of man.
zh: 流水磨蝕石頭， 水的氾溢沖去地上的塵土， 你也這樣滅絕人的指望。

en: You prevail forever against him, and he passes; you change his countenance, and send him away.
zh: 你永遠勝過人，人就去世， 你改變他的容貌，把他遣走。

en: His sons come to honor, and he does not know it; they are brought low, and he perceives it not.
zh: 他的兒女得尊榮，他並不曉得， 他們降為卑，他也不覺得，

en: He feels only the pain of his own body, and he mourns only for himself."
zh: 只覺自己身上的痛苦， 為自己悲哀。”
